info.name: GraphQL – Contacts Module
info.description: Root field `contacts`. Queries: contact, contacts, contactCount, contactQuery, filters, filterData. Mutations: createContact, updateContact, deleteContact, batchCreateContacts, exportContacts, importContacts (SuperAdmin path via job). Variables: contactUuid, companyUuid, fileKey.

request.description: Returns a list of Contact; selection applies per item.
SuperAdmin enforced in job service. Align s3Bucket with deployment.
